interesting.title: Did You Know? The Mississippi River's Hidden History
interesting.content: The Mississippi River, flowing through St. Louis, has been a critical transportation route for centuries. Interestingly, the river's course has shifted multiple times due to natural and human-made changes, including the creation of the Missouri River cutoff in the 19th century to improve navigation. Today, it remains a vital artery for commerce and culture in the region.
